prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the Environment Agency and water abstraction issues in England, particularly in Derbyshire. It does not apply to Scotland, which has a separate regulatory framework for water resources managed by the Scottish Environment Protection Agency.
